body_transformation: The rounded head now features smooth, scale-covered skin in deep ocean blue with subtle aquamarine highlights along the jawline. Short stubby legs are replaced with streamlined, webbed limbs ending in fin-like extensions, their pale cream accents transformed into pearly white. Pointed ears are reshaped into delicate, translucent fins that shimmer with seafoam green reflections. The curled tail tip elongates into a finned, streamlined form, its pale cream color deepening to a luminous teal. Dark brown markings are replaced by faint, glowing gill slits along the neck, blending seamlessly with the new scale texture.
signature_feature: Neck gills: translucent, scale-encased slits with faint aquamarine luminescence.
